CustomObject.label: VS Facility
CustomObject.description: F-001 slot-booking-core (VS-01, EP-01). PHC/CHC/District Hospital reference record — discoverable by citizens (REQ-001) and the parent of Session/Facility_Service/Holiday. OWD Public Read Only (design §2.2). Retention class (Annexure C4): permanent reference — never purged by VS_RetentionPurgeBatch.
